name: EightSaf Wallet
shortDescription: Non-custodial Chrome extension for Safrochain — send SAF, connect to dApps, and manage your keys locally.
description:
EightSaf Wallet is a non-custodial browser extension for Safrochain (Cosmos SDK). Private keys and your 24-word recovery phrase are generated and stored only on your device, encrypted with a spending password. The extension does not operate servers, user accounts, or analytics.

Users can create or restore a wallet, send and receive SAF on Safrochain Testnet, review transaction history, and connect to websites through the EightSaf provider (window.eightsaf) with explicit approval for each connection and signature. A Keplr-compatible API helps Cosmos dApps work without modification.

Install from the Chrome Web Store via eightsaf.io. A Firefox build is packaged separately for AMO submission. Mainnet support is prepared in the wallet and will align with Safrochain mainnet launch.
statusNote: Available on Chrome Web Store. Safrochain Testnet supported; mainnet when the network launches.
